case_title: MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS vs. YU, HSUEH-TZE YANG et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, HSUEH-TZE YANG THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 728 PACIFIC AVENUE, UNIT 111, S. F. CA, LEASE FORFEITED

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $105.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HSUEH-TZE YANG

AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $105.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS AS TO DEFENDANT YU, HSUEH-TZE YANG

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIRIWA CENTER INVESTMENTS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YU, HSUEH-TZE YANG $9,105.01 RENT, $1,250.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,460.01
